cext-review-toolkit.source: analysis_milestone_report_6 (2026-04-22); 575 on Discourse Apr 6, 645 at M5
cext-review-toolkit.meaning: cumulative sum of FIX-level findings itemized across the per-extension review reports (gisted)

fusil.findings_approx: ~142 (each catalog bug = a distinct crash finding); OOM sub-campaign 37 unique

fusil-tsan.findings_filed: 15 via umbrella #153852 (9 new + 6 residual) + 4 standalone crash issues (#153809, #154043, #154044, #154130)
fusil-tsan.mode: tsan (fusil --tsan ThreadSanitizer data-race fuzzing; a mode of fusil, like --oom-fuzz)
fusil-tsan.meaning: free-threading data-race/crash campaign; DISTINCT from ft-review-toolkit (that is the C-extension FT static-review campaign). Corroboration comments on ~18 pre-existing issues are excluded (commented-not-authored).

cpython-review-toolkit.meaning: 47 select FIX-level bugs; broader reports cover more findings

reconstruction_crosscheck.method: sum of ### N. finding headers in correctness reports
reconstruction_crosscheck.result: 115 findings across 12 machine-countable reports (~9.6 avg); ~50 reports x ~14 avg ~= 690
reconstruction_crosscheck.note: report formats vary; milestone cumulative is authoritative
